---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the ASDD standard or reference implementation is wrong or broken
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug, needs-triage
---

## Where
- [ ] The standard (`STANDARD.md` / `CONFORMANCE.md`)
- [ ] An agent lens spec or the runtime contract (`agents/`)
- [ ] Docs (`playbook/`, `standards/`, README)
- [ ] Templates / scaffolding (`.github/`)

> Bugs in the executable reference implementation (the workflows and scripts under `.github/` and
> `cli/`) belong here, alongside standard and docs issues.
